ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "hole_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the drilling hole from which the sample was taken */,
  "depth_from" REAL /* Depth from which the sample was collected (in meters) */,
  "depth_to" REAL /* Depth to which the sample was collected (in meters) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the sample (in meters) */,
  "fe_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of Iron (Fe) in the sample */,
  "sio2_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of Silicon Dioxide (SiO2) in the sample */,
  "al203_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of Aluminum Oxide (Al2O3) in the sample */,
  "p_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of Phosphorus (P) in the sample */,
  "loi_percentage" REAL /* Loss on Ignition (LOI) percentage of the sample */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date on which the sample was collected */,
  "sample_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling method used for this sample */,
  "sample_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_hole_id FOREIGN KEY ("hole_id") REFERENCES drilling_holes ("hole_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drilling_holes" (
  "hole_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each drilling hole */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the hole is located */,
  "hole_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the drilling hole */,
  "drill_date" TEXT /* Date on which the hole was drilled */,
  "depth_total" REAL /* Total depth of the drilling hole (in meters) */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the hole */,
  "hole_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the hole */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drilling_holes_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exploration site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the exploration site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exploration site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mineral_types" (
  "mineral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mineral type */,
  "mineral_name" TEXT /* Name of the mineral */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mineral properties */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the mineral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mineral_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_minerals" (
  "sample_mineral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mineral sample association */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "mineral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mineral associated with the sample */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the mineral in the sample */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_mineral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_minerals_mineral_id FOREIGN KEY ("mineral_id") REFERENCES mineral_types ("mineral_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., geologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., geology, data analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or description of the report contents */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* Report file (e.g., PDF, Word document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sampling method */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for the sampling method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hole_sampling_methods" (
  "hole_sampling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association of sampling method with a hole */,
  "hole_id" TEXT /* ID of the hole where the sampling method was used */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling method used */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date on which the sampling method was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hole_sampling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hole_sampling_methods_hole_id FOREIGN KEY ("hole_id") REFERENCES drilling_holes ("hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hole_sampling_methods_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES sampling_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geological_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geological model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the geological model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geological model */,
  "model_file" TEXT /* Geological model file (e.g., 3D model, simulation data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geological model used */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date on which the analysis was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_analysis_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES geological_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_analysis_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
